title: Eklo I
overview: In the aftermath of a mysterious virus outbreak in 2030, humanity fled Earth. By 2090, the sole surviving human lives in the mountains of Nepal. When two astronauts, having settled in space, return to Earth, they inadvertently encounter this last human survivor. As they delve into the mountain mysteries, they uncover the chilling enigma of the zombies that now roam the land.
